name: marketingskills
description: 32-skill interconnected marketing system covering SEO, copywriting, cold email, social media, and more. Features a product-marketing-context architecture for cross-skill state.
review: Exceptional 32-skill interconnected marketing system. First bundle to fill ProSkills marketing category. MIT license, actively maintained with 12k+ stars. Pure markdown skills with no security concerns. The product-marketing-context architectural pattern sets a high bar for future skill bundles.

drax_results.notes: 3/3 sampled skills passed. 31/32 bundle validate. Zero deps.
